name: phone
description: Connects Codex to a hosted phone agent after dashboard-based setup.

interface.shortDescription: Give Codex a phone line for approved calls.
interface.longDescription: phone connects Codex to a hosted MCP phone agent after the user signs in at phoneforagents.com, sets the name the assistant should use, completes billing or number setup when prompted, and mints a scoped API key. The bundled skills guide setup, verify calendar access when scheduling is involved, check service readiness, manage contacts, and require explicit user approval before calls are attempted.
defaultPrompt: Set up phone for my Codex.
Call an approved contact to book an appointment.
Check my calendar before placing a task call.
